name: nomarr
author: Nomarr
description: Nomarr ML-powered audio similarity for Instant Mix and personal playlist generation

http.reason: To query Nomarr API for ML-powered audio similarity and playlist generation

users.reason: Receive scrobble events and access user information for Subsonic API calls and playlist generation

subsonicapi.reason: Manage personal playlists in Navidrome on behalf of configured users

nomarr_url.title: Nomarr API URL
nomarr_url.description: Base URL of your Nomarr instance (e.g. http://nomarr:8356)

nomarr_api_key.title: Nomarr API Key
nomarr_api_key.description: API key for authenticating with Nomarr

backbone_id.title: ML Backbone
backbone_id.description: Vector backbone identifier used for similarity search (e.g. effnet, effnet-discogs)

pp_enabled.title: Enable Personal Playlists
pp_enabled.description: Enable scheduled personal playlist generation from Nomarr

pp_schedule_cron.title: Playlist Schedule (Cron)
pp_schedule_cron.description: Cron expression for playlist generation schedule. Default: daily at 3 AM

users.title: Playlist Users
users.description: Users for personal playlist generation. Each entry specifies a Navidrome username and optional preferences.

username.title: Username
username.description: Navidrome username to generate playlists for

enabled_types.title: Enabled Playlist Types
enabled_types.description: Which playlist types to generate. Default: all types.

max_songs.title: Max Songs
max_songs.description: Maximum number of songs per playlist. Default: 50.

min_songs.title: Min Songs
min_songs.description: Minimum number of songs required to create a playlist. Default: 5.

max_genre_playlists.title: Max Genre Playlists
max_genre_playlists.description: Maximum number of per-genre playlists to generate. Valid range: 1-25. Default: 5.
